ham: Hello Rahul, this is Priya from HR at XYZ Corp. We would like to schedule your interview for the Senior Analyst role. Can you please confirm your availability on 12th May 2023 at 10:00 AM? Reply 'Yes' to proceed.
spam: Hey! Aapko ek amazing remote job offer mila hai! 🚀 Apply karne ke liye <URL> visit kare. 10,000 INR ka bonus milega! Time limit hai, jaldi reply kare. Best wishes, HR Team.
